subcodes.first_line: Sanctified praise, transcending manifestation and appearance, tongue and utterance, perception and minds, befitteth the Goal of the world [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد مقدس از ظهور و بروز و لسان و بیان و ادراک و عقول مقصود عالم را لایق و
subcodes.subjects: @thankfulness; gratitude, @corruption and decline of Islam; of the Shi'ih, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @purpose of religion in the world (personal and social), @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @wisdom [hikmat]
